name: Tax Paperwork Staging Board
description: Gather scattered tax-time paperwork quickly into a clear staging board with a missing-items checklist, folder map, and handoff cover sheet, without giving tax or legal advice.
author: Bell (design)
target_user: People preparing tax-season paperwork for self-prep, a tax professional, bookkeeper, or family reviewer.
use_cases: Creating a tax paperwork folder map
Sorting scattered paper and digital records
